use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF NAUSEA AND VOMITING OF PREGNANCY IN WOMEN WHO DO NOT RESPOND TO CONSERVATIVE MANAGEMENT

indications.text:
2 DOSAGE AND ADMINISTRATION 10 OVERDOSAGE
2.1Dosage Information 10.1 Signs and Symptoms of Overdose
3 DOSAGE FORMS AND STRENGTHS 10.2 Management of Overdose

DICLEGIS is indicated for the treatment of nausea and vomiting of pregnancy in women who do not respond to
conservative management.
Limitations of Use
DICLEGIS has not been studied in women with hyperemesis gravidarum.

The most common adverse reaction with DICLEGIS (≥5 percent and
exceeding the rate in placebo) is somnolence. (6)
DICLEGIS is a fixed dose combination drug product of doxylamine
succinate, an antihistamine, and pyridoxine hydrochloride, a Vitamin To report SUSPECTED ADVERSE REACTIONS, contact
